response:
```json
{
  "action": "sql",
  "sql": "SELECT
  SUM(dly.tot_sls_amt) AS daily_sales_total,
  SUM(oh.tot_amt) AS order_header_total,
  SUM(dly.tot_sls_amt) - SUM(oh.tot_amt) AS reconciliation_difference,
  CASE
    WHEN SUM(dly.tot_sls_amt) = SUM(oh.tot_amt) THEN 'RECONCILES'
    ELSE 'DOES NOT RECONCILE'
  END AS reconciliation_status
FROM main.dly_sls_agg dly
FULL OUTER JOIN main.ord_hdr oh
  ON dly.agg_dt_key = oh.date_key
  AND dly.store_id = oh.store_id
WHERE oh.sts_cd <> 'X'",
  "reason": null
}
```
